pages.text: Seals the sky with red chains. Red cross-anchor with dotted outer ring. Chains connect to high-flying targets with rotating arcane sigils.

Effect: Tracks entities above 2 blocks height within 8 block radius. Pulls down with scaling force. Red hexagram, rings and runes on targets. 1.0 magic damage/s.$(br2)Special Enhancement: Chain Force - Increases pull strength.
